desc_ar: إنجليزي بسيط عن النمو المهني: التعلّم، المهارات، الخبرة، والترقية.
why_ar: لتتعلّم كلمات الإنجليزي التي تصف كيف يتطوّر الإنسان في عمله ويحقّق أهدافه.
outcomes: تقرأ نصاً بسيطاً عن النمو المهني
تتعلّم كلمات: skill, goal, promotion, experience
تستخدم المضارع التام لوصف خبرتك في العمل
warmup: ما هو هدفك في عملك أو دراستك؟

grammar.explain_ar: نستخدم المضارع التام للكلام عن خبرة في الحياة (شيء حدث في وقتٍ ما، بدون تحديد الوقت بالضبط). الصيغة: have/has + التصريف الثالث للفعل (past participle). نستخدم has مع he/she/it، و have مع I/you/we/they.
grammar.explain_en_html:
Present Perfect

We use it for life experience — something that happened at some time, without saying exactly when.
Form: have/has + past participle.
I have worked in a shop.
She has learned a new skill.

examples.sentence: I have worked in an office.
She has learned many new skills.

mistakes.wrong: She have learned a new skill.
mistakes.correct: She has learned a new skill.
mistakes.explanation_ar: مع she نستخدم has وليس have.

mistakes.wrong: He has work here for two years.
mistakes.correct: He has worked here for two years.
mistakes.explanation_ar: بعد has نحتاج التصريف الثالث worked وليس work.

items.question: I ___ in a big company for three years.
items.explanation_ar: مع I نستخدم have مع worked.

items.question: She ___ many new skills at her job.
items.explanation_ar: مع she نستخدم has مع learned.

items.question: They ___ their big goal this year.
items.explanation_ar: مع they نستخدم have مع reached.

readings.label: A
paragraphs: Omar works in a small shop. Two years ago, he did not know much. He wanted to *learn* many new things. Every day, he asked his *manager* questions. He learned how to help the *customers* and how to count the money. Slowly, his *skills* got better.

Omar likes his *job*. He wants to *grow* and do more. His big *goal* is to become a team leader. He works hard every day to reach it. He *practices* his English too, because many customers speak English. He knows that good skills help him grow.

Last month, something good happened. His manager gave him more *experience*. Omar now *trains* the new workers. He shows them how to do the job. He feels happy and proud. He has learned a lot, and he is still learning today.

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: A worker who learns and grows at his job
A man who buys a new shop
A student who fails his exam
questions.correct_answer: A worker who learns and grows at his job
questions.explanation_ar: النص عن عاملٍ يتعلّم وينمو في عمله.
قال النص إن عمر يعمل في محلٍّ صغير.

questions.question_en: In the passage, what does the word 'goal' mean?
choices: A thing you want to reach
questions.correct_answer: A thing you want to reach

choices: Because he wants to leave his job
questions.explanation_ar: يتمرّن لأنّ كثيراً من الزبائن يتحدثون الإنجليزية.

questions.question_en: What can we understand about Omar?
choices: He is hard-working and wants to grow
He does not like his job
questions.correct_answer: He is hard-working and wants to grow
questions.explanation_ar: نفهم أنه مجتهد ويريد أن ينمو.

choices: His manager gave him more experience
He started to work in the shop
questions.correct_answer: His manager gave him more experience
questions.explanation_ar: في الشهر الماضي أعطاه مديره خبرة أكثر.

questions.question_en: What does Omar do now with the new workers?
questions.question_ar: ماذا يفعل عمر الآن مع العمال الجدد؟

vocab: to get new knowledge or a skill
the person who leads a team or shop
a thing you can do well
Good skills help you get a job.
the work a person does for money
He wants to grow in his career.
a thing you want to reach
My goal is to speak English well.
the things you learn by doing work
She has ten years of experience.
to teach a person how to do something
to do something many times to get better

readings.label: B
paragraphs: Sara started her *career* five years ago. Her first job was a small one. She was a helper in a big office. She made coffee and cleaned the desks. But Sara had a big dream. She wanted to *improve* and do more important work.

Every week, Sara learned a new *skill*. She read books at night. She asked for help from her *boss*. After two years, she got a *promotion*. Now she worked with the team. She got more *experience* and more money. Her hard work started to help her *career*.

Today, Sara is a manager. She has reached her big *goal*. She trains young helpers, just like she was before. She tells them, 'You can *grow* too.' Sara has learned one thing: hard work and new *skill* can change your life.

questions.question_en: What is the main idea of the passage?
choices: Sara grew from a helper to a manager
Sara stopped working after one year
Sara did not like her boss
questions.correct_answer: Sara grew from a helper to a manager
questions.explanation_ar: الفكرة أن سارة تطوّرت من مساعِدة إلى مديرة.

choices: She was a helper in an office
questions.correct_answer: She was a helper in an office

choices: She made coffee for the team

questions.question_en: In the passage, what does 'improve' mean?
Why did Sara's career start to grow?
questions.question_ar: لماذا بدأت مسيرة سارة المهنية في النمو؟
choices: Because of her hard work and new skills
questions.correct_answer: Because of her hard work and new skills
questions.explanation_ar: بدأت تنمو بسبب عملها المجتهد ومهاراتها الجديدة.

questions.question_en: What does Sara believe about work?
choices: Hard work and new skills can change your life
It is better to stay a helper
questions.correct_answer: Hard work and new skills can change your life
questions.explanation_ar: تؤمن أن العمل المجتهد والمهارات الجديدة يغيّران حياتك.

questions.question_en: What does Sara do for young helpers now?
questions.question_ar: ماذا تفعل سارة الآن للمساعِدين الشباب؟

vocab: the jobs a person does over many years
She has a long career in business.
He wants to improve his English.
Her boss gave her a promotion.
a move to a better, higher job
She got a promotion after two years.
the things you learn by doing work
a thing you want to reach
Her goal is to be a manager.
a thing you can do well
You can grow at your job.
a person who helps at work
She was a helper in the office.
a place where people work at desks
She works in a big office.

listening.transcript: Hi, I'm Khalid. I work in a company. I started three years ago as a new worker. I have learned many skills since then. Last month, I got a promotion. Now I train the new people. My goal is to become a manager one day. I love my job because I grow every year.

exercises.question_en: When did Khalid start his job?

exercises.explanation_ar: هدفه أن يصبح مديراً يوماً ما.

exercises.question_en: Why does Khalid love his job?
exercises.explanation_ar: يحب عمله لأنه ينمو كل سنة.

writing.title_en: Write about your goals at work
writing.prompt_en: Write about your goals. What job do you want? What skills do you want to learn? How will you grow?
writing.prompt_ar: اكتب عن أهدافك. أيّ وظيفة تريد؟ ما المهارات التي تريد تعلّمها؟ كيف ستنمو؟

speaking.title_en: Talk about a skill you want to learn
speaking.prompt_en: Talk about a skill you want to learn for your career. Why is it important? How will it help you grow?
speaking.prompt_ar: تحدث عن مهارة تريد تعلّمها لمسيرتك المهنية. لماذا هي مهمة؟ كيف ستساعدك على النمو؟
prep: حضّر كلمات: skill, learn, goal, grow
رتّب: ما هي المهارة، ولماذا هي مهمة
